reviews.comment:
Tardan muchísimo en atender. Pq la gente deja el auto en los surtidores y se va comprar adentro. Mientras los demás esperamos y esperamos a que muevan el auto. La atención de los chicos buenísima.

(Translated by Google)
They take ages to serve you. Because people leave their cars at the pumps and go inside to shop. Meanwhile, the rest of us wait and wait for them to move our cars. The staff are great, though.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNTcFlMSE9BEAE

reviews.comment:
Mi lugar favorito para hacer un recreo volviendo de la costa. Mesas, un bosquecito con sombra, baños limpios y local para hacer compras de comidas o bebidas

(Translated by Google)
My favorite place to take a break on the way back from the beach. Tables, a shady little grove, clean restrooms, and a place to buy food or drinks.
